page_metadata.biotools__summary: Quadruplex forming G-Rich Sequences (QGRS) Mapper searches nucleotide sequences for the presence of G-quartet motifs.  QGRS Mapper allows you to view the distribution and composition of QGRS in the context of alternatively spliced isoforms of your gene.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Quadruplex forming G-Rich Sequences (QGRS) Mapper searches nucleotide sequences for the presence of G-quartet motifs.  QGRS Mapper allows you to view the distribution and composition of QGRS in the context of alternatively spliced isoforms of your gene.
